description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent hip roof made of textured, thatch-like material. The exterior walls are primarily white with wooden accents, and the building is elevated on stilts, creating a covered parking area beneath. A large, open wooden staircase wraps around one side, providing access to the upper floor, which includes spacious balconies with wooden railings. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, framed with wood, and the house includes both open and enclosed sections, suggesting a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The property is set on a rectangular grassy plot, and a car is visible parked under the house, emphasizing its stilted design.
description: A two-story stilted house with a hip thatched roof, white walls, wooden accents, and wraparound balconies, set on a grassy plot with a covered parking area below.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open wooden staircase, wraparound balcony, and main entrance area beneath the hip roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stilted structure, covered parking area with a car, and the solid wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window rows, wooden accents, and the car parked under the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the open balconies, visible interior furnishings, and extensive use of wood in the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Open entryway beneath the house with a wide wooden staircase, covered by the upper floor and roof overhang, and no prominent porch or columns.
